name: Golf Grindelwald - Play at the foot of the Eiger
description: Discover Golf Grindelwald - Play at the foot of the Eiger in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Golf Grindelwald - Play at the foot of the Eiger in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Golf
subcategory.description: Discover your exceptional place for golf and book right here. Green meadows on remote high valleys, behind them the mountains and a view of the beautiful lake landscape. What could be better than playing golf in the middle of it all? You will find well-kept golf courses everywhere in Switzerland. You can practice your tee shot in the vastness of the Engadine, in Lavaux with a view over the Vaud Alps or in Grindelwald in front of an impressive mountain panorama.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online
